title: Feedback - Mopinion form is opened
scenario: Mopinion feedback form in App Settings displays empty fields and options incorrectly on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Observe the Mopinion feedback form that loads
expected: The Mopinion feedback form displays correctly with empty fields and options: options (Bug, Suggestion, Compliment, Other), fields (Your Feedback, Name, Last name, email), and a Send button.
